pathway_process: Cell-cycle progression and proliferative tumor-state biology
interpretive_use: Use OIP5 as a proliferation-linked dependency hypothesis, not as a direct GBM-specific therapeutic target without additional selectivity evidence.
validation_suggestions: Compare OIP5 dependency with pan-essential and cell-cycle gene sets; test whether dependency tracks proliferation rate, cell-cycle state, and broad essentiality rather than GBM-specific biology.
